title: Travel and airports
description: Arriving 3 hours early, overpacking and that moment when your bag is 0.5kg overweight — travel has its universal stresses! See if your airport rituals match the crowd!

questions.text: Name something people panic about at the airport.
Name something people do during a long layover.

answers.text: eat at the airport restaurant or bar
sleep on chairs or the floor
charge phone and scroll social media

questions.text: What do people overpack in their suitcase?

answers.text: clothes they never end up wearing

questions.text: Name something people buy at the airport they didn't plan to.

answers.text: a gift or souvenir they don't need

questions.text: What do people say when the flight is delayed?

answers.text: I'm going to miss my connection
at least I'm in the airport bar
will we still arrive on time?

questions.text: Name something people do on the plane to pass the time.

answers.text: watch a film or TV show
chat to the person next to them

questions.text: Name something that makes a flight really uncomfortable.

answers.text: middle seat with no armrest space
the person reclined in front of you

questions.text: Name something tourists do that locals find annoying.

answers.text: go to all the tourist traps and nothing authentic

questions.text: Name something people say when they get home from a holiday.

answers.text: I need a holiday to recover from the holiday
I want to move there permanently

questions.text: Name a travel item people swear by but forget to pack.
